**Benzene HOMO–LUMO orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: remained as in input benzene.xyz; no relaxation performed at DFT level (single point analysis). The SCF converged in 8 cycles.
HOMO = −7.0468 eV, LUMO = −0.4157 eV → **gap ≈ 6.6311 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
